series_metadata.series_description: These reports are filed with the Division of Financial Institutions by individual credit unions as required by Ohio Revised Code Section 1733.32(C).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files until next financial report then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
